dj_text: That was The B-52s - "Love Shack" [Bardcore | Medieval version]. Next is CAN'T HELP FALLING IN LOVE | Medieval Bardcore Version | Elvis Presley vs Beedle the Bardcore. Try to keep up. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: {dad's voice}: Gather 'round, landlubbers and sea-farers alike!
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: CAN'T HELP FALLING IN LOVE | Medieval Bardcore Version | Elvis Presley vs Beedle the Bardcore
